mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, row_group_key, sort_order, is_fixed, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted FROM dashboard_user_layout WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO dashboard_user_layout (user_id, row_group_key, sort_order, is_fixed, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.rowGroupKey}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.isFixed}, NOW(), NOW(), #{item.createBy}, #{item.updateBy}, 0)
